executives.name: Peter Platzer
executives.background: Mr. Platzer is a co-founder of Spire and has served as our Chief Executive Officer and a member of our board of directors since September 2012. Prior to that, he served as a Senior Portfolio Manager at Vega Asset Management and a Managing Director at Deutsche Bank. He holds an M.S. in Physics from the Technical University of Vienna, an M.B.A. from Harvard Business School, and an M.Sc. in Space Studies from the International Space University.

executives.name: Leo S. Austin
executives.background: Mr. Austin has served as our Chief Financial Officer since July 2024. Prior to joining Spire, he served as the Chief Financial Officer of Lordstown Motors Corp. and held various senior finance roles at other technology companies. He holds a B.A. in Economics from the University of Virginia and an M.B.A. from the University of Pennsylvania's Wharton School.

executives.name: Theresa Condor
executives.background: Ms. Condor has served as our Chief Operating Officer since January 2022 and previously served as our Executive Vice President, Corporate Development since February 2013. She holds a B.A. in International Studies from Seattle University and an M.I.A. from Columbia University.

executives.name: Ananda Martin
executives.background: Ms. Martin has served as our General Counsel since January 2021. Prior to joining Spire, she was a partner at Paul Hastings LLP. She holds a B.A. from Yale University and a J.D. from Harvard Law School.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Platzer
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder and CEO of Spire Global, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Stephen Johnson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Johnson has served as a member of our board of directors since August 2021. He previously served as a director of NavSight from September 2020 until the closing of the Business Combination. He is currently the President and CEO of North Atlantic Capital.

board_of_directors.name: Dirk Hoke
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hoke has served as a member of our board of directors since November 2021. He is currently the CEO of Volocopter GmbH and was previously the CEO of Airbus Defence and Space.

board_of_directors.name: William Porteous
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Porteous has served as a member of our board of directors since 2014. He is a General Partner at RRE Ventures.

board_of_directors.name: Michelle Kley
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Kley has served as a member of our board of directors since December 2022. She is the Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary of Virgin Galactic Holdings, Inc.
